Tests if `String.prototype` is the prototype of a new `String` object.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion that checks if the `String` prototype is part of the prototype chain of a newly created `String` object. It uses the `assert` function to verify that `String.prototype.isPrototypeOf(new String(""))` returns `true`, which confirms that the `new String("")` object is indeed an instance of `String`. This code provides narrow functionality, serving as a basic test to ensure the correct behavior of JavaScript's prototype inheritance for `String` objects.
